methodology.leaderboard: OVERALL / ALL time / ordered by PNL
methodology.dualOutcomeRule: A trader is excluded if they currently hold more than one outcome in the same conditionId.
methodology.ranking: Supporter count first, then same-side consensus rate, rank-weighted support, and combined current position value.
methodology.activeMarketRule: Only Gamma markets that are active, not closed or archived, and accepting orders are shown.
